ddls:
CREATE TABLE "puzzles" (
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each puzzle */,
  "puzzle_name" TEXT /* Name of the puzzle */,
  "unlock_time" TEXT /* Time when the puzzle was unlocked */,
  "solve_time" TEXT /* Time when the puzzle was solved */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the puzzle */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator of the puzzle */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the puzzle */,
  "hints_provided" INTEGER /* Number of hints provided with the puzzle */,
  "total_solves" INTEGER /* Total number of times the puzzle has been solved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attempt */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle being attempted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the attempt */,
  "attempt_time" TEXT /* Time when the attempt was made */,
  "incorrect_guesses" INTEGER /* Number of incorrect guesses */,
  "partials_confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of partial solves */,
  "hint_used" INTEGER /* Whether a hint was used during the attempt */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Whether the attempt was successful or not */,
  "time_spent" REAL /* Total time spent on the attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_puzzle_attempts_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "total_time_spent" REAL /* Total time spent on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stats" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "total_puzzles_solved" INTEGER /* Total number of puzzles solved by the user */,
  "average_solve_time" REAL /* Average solve time for the user */,
  "total_incorrect_guesses" INTEGER /* Total number of incorrect guesses made by the user */,
  "total_puzzles_attempted" INTEGER /* Total number of puzzles the user has attempted */,
  "total_time_spent" REAL /* Total time the user has spent on the platform */,
  "total_hints_used" INTEGER /* Total number of hints the user has used */,
  "total_partial_solves" INTEGER /* Total number of partial solves by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "puzzle_stats" (
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle */,
  "total_attempts" INTEGER /* Total number of attempts made on the puzzle */,
  "average_solve_time" REAL /* Average solve time for the puzzle */,
  "most_recent_solve" TEXT /* Most recent solve time for the puzzle */,
  "total_partial_solves" INTEGER /* Total number of partial solves for the puzzle */,
  "total_hints_used" INTEGER /* Total number of hints used for the puzzle */,
  "total_failures" INTEGER /* Total number of failed attempts for the puzzle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "solve_time" TEXT /* Solve time for the user */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user on the leaderboard */,
  "solve_date" TEXT /* Date when the solve was achieved */,
  "time_spent" REAL /* Total time spent on the puzzle for the leaderboard entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "puzzle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the puzzle */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "date_awarded" TEXT /* Date when the badge was awarded */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the badge being awarded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_badges_puzzle_id FOREIGN KEY ("puzzle_id") REFERENCES puzzles ("puzzle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "date_unlocked" TEXT /* Date when the achievement was unlocked */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., puzzle attempt, badge awarded) */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time when the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
